2603.17917.title: Only relative ranks matter in weight-clustered large language models
2603.17917.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) contain billions of parameters, yet many exact values are not essential. We show that what matters most is the relative rank of weights-whether one connection is stronger or weaker than another-rather than precise magnitudes. To reduce the number of unique weight values, we apply weight clustering to pretrained models, replacing every weight matrix with K shared values from K-means. For Llama 3.1-8B-Instruct and SmolLM2-135M, reducing each matrix to only 16-64 distinct values preserves strong accuracy without retraining, providing a simple, training-free method to compress LLMs on disk. Optionally fine-tuning only the cluster means (centroids) recovers 30-40 percent of the remaining accuracy gap at minimal cost. We then systematically randomize cluster means while keeping assignments fixed. Scrambling the relative ranks of the clusters degrades quality sharply-perplexity can increase by orders of magnitude-even when global statistics such as mean and variance are preserved. In contrast, rank-preserving randomizations cause almost no loss at mid and late layers. On the other hand, when many layers are perturbed simultaneously, progressive layer-by-layer replacement reveals that scale drift-not rank distortion-is the dominant collapse mechanism; however, an affine correction w' = aw + b with a > 0 (which preserves both rank order and overall weight distribution) can substantially delay this drift. This rank-based perspective offers a new lens on model compression and robustness.
2603.17917.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）包含數十億個參數，但許多確切的數值並不是必需的。<lb/>我們展示了最重要的是權重的相對排名——某個連接是否比另一個更強或更弱——而不是精確的大小。<lb/>為了減少獨特權重值的數量，我們對預訓練模型應用權重聚類，將每個權重矩陣替換為來自 K-means 的 K 個共享值。<lb/>對於 Llama 3.1-8B-Instruct 和 SmolLM2-135M，將每個矩陣減少到僅 16-64 個不同的值能在不重新訓練的情況下保持強大的準確性，提供了一種簡單的無需訓練的 LLM 壓縮方法。<lb/>可選地僅微調聚類均值（質心）能以最小的成本恢復 30-40% 的剩餘準確性差距。<lb/>然後，我們系統性地隨機化聚類均值，同時保持分配不變。<lb/>打亂聚類的相對排名會急劇降低質量——困惑度可能會增加數個數量級——即使全球統計數據如均值和方差得以保留。<lb/>相比之下，保持排名的隨機化在中層和後層幾乎不會造成損失。<lb/>另一方面，當許多層同時受到擾動時，逐層替換顯示出規模漂移——而不是排名扭曲——是主要的崩潰機制；然而，具有 a > 0 的仿射修正 w' = aw + b（保留排名順序和整體權重分佈）可以顯著延遲這種漂移。<lb/>這種基於排名的視角為模型壓縮和穩健性提供了一個新的視角。
2603.17917.author: Borja Aizpurua et.al.
2603.17917.authors: Borja Aizpurua, Sukhbinder Singh, Román Orús
